name: mutsuki-plugin-dev-test-io
description: Dev-only process I/O test harness tools for Mutsuki.

interface.shortDescription: Run dev test processes and capture I/O for Mutsuki.
interface.longDescription: Adds local MCP tools for running commands, driving interactive processes, and sending JSONL requests as a dev-only test utility.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Mutsuki Dev Test I/O to run protocol smoke tests.
